debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
inst✝³ : PartialOrder ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι
E : Type u_3
inst✝¹ : FirstCountableTopology ι
inst✝ : PseudoMetricSpace E
f : ι → E
hf : @IsCadlag ι E inst✝³ inst✝² PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace f
s : Set ι
hs : IsCompact s
⊢ Bornology.IsBounded (f '' s)

failed_attempts:
have h_loc : ∀ x ∈ s, ∃ U ∈ nhds x, IsBounded (f '' U) :=
    fun x _ => isCadlag_locally_bounded hf x
  choose! U hU using h_loc
  obtain ⟨t, ht₁, ht₂⟩ :
      ∃ t : Finset ι', (∀ x ∈ t, x ∈ s) ∧ s ⊆ ⋃ x ∈ t, U x := by
    have := hs.elim_nhds_subcover U fun x hx => (hU x hx).1
    aesop
  have h_bdd : Bornology.IsBounded (⋃ x ∈ t, f '' U x) := by
    exact (isBounded_biUnion_finset t).mpr fun x hx => (hU x (ht₁ x hx)).2
  exact h_bdd.subset (Set.image_subset_iff.2 fun x hx =>
    Set.mem_iUnion₂.2 <| by
      rcases Set.mem_iUnion₂.1 (ht₂ hx) with ⟨y, hy, hy'⟩
      exact ⟨y, hy, Set.mem_image_of_mem _ hy'⟩)

end BoundedImage
